result.stdout:
xbrlplus - XBRL to SQLite REPL
Usage: xbrlplus.exe <schema|instance|manifest file path>
Examples:
  xbrlplus.exe jpcrp030000-asr-001_E02011-000_2025-04-30_01_2025-07-28.xsd
  xbrlplus.exe jpcrp030000-asr-001_E02011-000_2025-04-30_01_2025-07-28.xbrl
  xbrlplus.exe manifest_PublicDoc.xml
